narrative:
Geneva-On-The-Lake Village has 551 registered voters, with 61.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.4%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.0 percentage points.
